name: Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
2 Mix all ingredients thoroughly. Pour into pie shell.
3 Bake until a knife inserted about 1 inch from the side comes out clean, about 45-55 minutes. The center will look soft but will set.
4 Serve slightly warm with a dollop of whipped cream.
